title: MaoPhone - Trial Version
description: Trial version of the phone mod for "Run For Money" Minecraft video series.
body:
# MaoPhone - Trial Version

MaoPhone is a specialized phone mod created for the "Run For Money" series by "骑单车の茂茂" (QiDanCheDeMaoMao / Murasame_mao).

This mod is a publicly released trial version of MaoPhone, which removes features related to the series and only retains the native functions of the phone.

Although named as "trial version", this mod has very complete features and can be considered as a formal version mod for use.

This mod is still in the development stage. If you have any features you want to add, you can leave a comment here or contact me!

## Main functions
- Players can use MaoPhone to send and receive messages, and freely express themselves in a public chat room.
- You can take photos, save them, or send them to other players.
- A very practical compass that can display your orientation in real-time on the screen.
- Record your movement steps in survival mode or adventure mode. There is also a step ranking list that resets every Earth day.
- A very fun Snake Game and a scoring ranking list.
- Linked with SimpleVoiceChat mod, each player will receive a random phone number, and players can communicate remotely through the calling function.
- Players can also customize their nicknames and phone wallpapers.

## CREDITS
- Author: DrIceTea ([Bilibili](https://space.bilibili.com/406143070) / [GitHub](https://github.com/DrIceTea123))
- Assist Developer: SNWCreations ([GitHub](https://github.com/SNWCreations))
- Model & Texture: magic_detectiveZ
- Authorizer: 骑单车の茂茂 (Murasame_mao) ([Bilibili](https://space.bilibili.com/8957291) / [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@maomaodashuaige))

# MaoPhone - 体验版

MaoPhone是为骑单车の茂茂的《逃亡中》系列作品制作的专用手机Mod。

这个Mod是MaoPhone公开发布的体验版本，移除了系列作品相关的功能，只保留了手机的原生功能。

虽然命名为“体验版”，但此mod的功能非常完整，完全可以视为一个正式版mod使用。

此Mod仍处于开发阶段。如果你有想添加的功能，可以在这里评论，或联系我！

## 主要功能
- 玩家可以使用MaoPhone发送与接收短信，还可以在公共聊天室畅所欲言。
- 可以拍摄照片，可以将拍摄的照片保存下来，或发给其他玩家。
- 非常实用的指南针，可以在屏幕上实时显示你的朝向。
- 记录你在生存模式或冒险模式下的移动步数，并且还有一个步数排行榜，排行榜每个地球日重置。
- 非常好玩的贪吃蛇小游戏，以及一个得分排行榜。
- 与SimpleVoiceChat Mod联动，每位玩家都会获得一个随机的电话号码，玩家可以通过电话功能远程交流。
- 玩家还可以自定义昵称和手机壁纸。

## 致谢
- 作者：醉冰茶 ([Bilibili](https://space.bilibili.com/406143070) / [GitHub](https://github.com/DrIceTea123))
- 协助开发：ZX夏夜之风 ([GitHub](https://github.com/SNWCreations))
- 模型&材质：奇思妙想的小张_Z
- 授权方：骑单车の茂茂 ([Bilibili](https://space.bilibili.com/8957291) / [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@maomaodashuaige))
